payload.title: Lower or loudly document the MSRV (1.95 dragged the reviewer's toolchain forward)
payload.description: Reviewer: 'Requiring rustc ≥1.95 forced a toolchain bump that surfaced a new clippy lint (collapsible_match) and broke an unrelated -D warnings gate. Adopting a linter shouldn't drag the whole toolchain forward.' workspace Cargo.toml declares rust-version = "1.95" but the only modern std APIs found are is_some_and/is_ok_and (stable since 1.70). Verify the true minimum (cargo-msrv or manual) and lower rust-version accordingly; if something genuinely needs a high floor, document why loudly. The advisory-linter path especially should run on a wide toolchain range.
